response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain knowledge, and SQL Server/Oracle expertise — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and DLang/TypeScript ecosystems with no evidence of financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source contributions and tooling
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ or Windows platform experience in resume
No domain exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
SQL experience listed but no context for SQL Server/Oracle in financial systems
